REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (738 C St, Fresno, California)
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
G. Franchesca Callejo for Jasmine Debella, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Logan Fraser, Agent.
Gloria Sayles, Realtor.
Dominic Jackson, Buyer.

The court called for overbids in the courtroom and via Zoom. No overbids were received.

The sale was confirmed at $35,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). No additional bond is required. The matter was taken under submission with intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for Jasmine Debella (administrator).

Mrs. Callejo stated that they now have someone to assist them with the sale of the Fresno property, that there is no cash in the estate, that she will file an ex parte petition and that the intent is to sell the property with just a notice of proposed action. Mrs. Callejo also provided history regarding the loss of the San Francisco property. Status on close of estate is continued to July 16, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Callejo is to have filed her ex parte petition by then and if nothing else, Mrs. Callejo is to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Apr-02-2024 Continued To Jun-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Franchesca Callejo appeared by zoom for Jasmine Debella (administrator).

Mrs. Callejo provided an oral report on status of the Fresno property, stated that she is contemplating filing a petition to terminate the estate for lack of assets, and requested a 60 to 90-day continuance. Status on close of estate is continued to June 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Callejo is to file a petition for approval of a report on status of administration one week prior.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: D. Nguyen. Not reported.
